title: Nilgiris tourism rebounds as monsoon onset stays favourable
summary: Hotel occupancy in Ooty and Coonoor crossed 78 percent on May 8 as the early monsoon onset stayed mild, drawing weekend visitors from Bengaluru, Coimbatore and Kerala.

title: Nilgiris tea auction sees firm prices for orthodox grades
summary: The Coonoor tea auction on May 8 reported firm prices for orthodox grades, with several Nilgiris bio gardens fetching premiums on export demand from West Asia.

title: Nilgiris MLA-elect to push for special hill-area development board
summary: The Nilgiris MLA-elect has said she will push the new government to revive the special hill-area development board to address landslides, mobility and tourism infrastructure.

title: Mettupalayam ghat road toll booth gets new FASTag system
summary: A new FASTag-enabled toll system has gone live at the Mettupalayam ghat road approach, aimed at easing weekend traffic toward Coonoor and Ooty.

title: Pykara and Catherine Falls reopen with safety advisories
summary: Pykara and Catherine Falls in the Nilgiris reopened to tourists on May 8 with new safety advisories, following safety audits and a brief closure earlier in the week.
